title: Steam Powered Girl adds Hit Dice and Atk Dice from hand size

card.rawText: For 1 turn cycle, for every card in your hand, add Hit Dice Rolls +1 and Atk Dice Rolls +1.

effect.value: For 1 turn cycle, for every card in your hand, add Hit Dice Rolls +1 and Atk Dice Rolls +1.

plan.title: Steam Powered Girl adds Hit Dice and Atk Dice from hand size
plan.summary: Equip Steam Powered Girl and verify the battle pipeline uses the extra Hit Dice Rolls and Atk Dice Rolls from the hand-scaling text.

notes: Read text first: for 1 turn cycle, every card in hand adds Hit Dice Rolls +1 and Atk Dice Rolls +1.

steps: Equip Steam Powered Girl to player_1 primary.
Inspect hit dice, damage dice, and final damage.

expectedAssertions.label: Steam Powered Girl battle modifier event emitted
Extra attack die increases first strike damage to 3
Battle log includes Steam Powered Girl modifier note

manualVerification: Confirm the bonus is tied to the 1 turn-cycle duration and the hand-count scaling remains visible in battle output.
riskNotes: The current runner proves one hand-scaling increment through battle dice output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Equip Steam Powered Girl and verify the battle pipeline uses the extra Hit Dice Rolls and Atk Dice Rolls from the hand-scaling text.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
